content.en:
Tianhai Sect.

Several Supreme True Ancestors had awakened their consciousness and were discussing the matter of the Forbidden Dao Stone Vein in the Forbidden Mountain Range.

"The Forbidden Dao Stone vein is very valuable, compared to the unknown Forbidden Treasure, this is the visible benefit! Generally, the Forbidden Treasure with a relatively small effect is worth up to 100,000 Forbidden Dao Stones. "

"Shall we forcibly occupy that forbidden Dao stone vein?"

"The price for us to do so is too great to do so as a last resort. Moreover, we still don't know the output of the Forbidden Dao Stone Vein, if there are only 100,000 Forbidden Dao Stones, then there is no need to make a move, at least there are more than one million Forbidden Dao Stone Veins to be worthy of our supreme Dao Ancestor to force it!"

"The million output is estimated to be no, after all, the forbidden world has not yet been born, and there are only this signs at present, in such a situation, how can a forbidden treasure land give birth to a million output of the forbidden Dao stone vein!"

"If the output is not much, then let those seven or eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors make a move, they also lack forbidden Dao Stones, and it is estimated that they will not be able to help but make a move!"

Not only the supreme Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect were discussing, but the supreme Dao Ancestors of other forces were also discussing, but without enough benefits and benefits, these supreme Dao Ancestors would not make a move at all.

After all, if the Supreme Dao Ancestor makes a move at this time, he also needs to contend with the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and his strength will be reduced a lot, and there is a risk of falling.

Unless it's a real chance, they won't do it.

For example, the forbidden treasure that was born last time, although they were also a little excited, they didn't make a move.

It's the same this time.

At the heart of the Forbidden Mountains.

With the discovery of the Forbidden Dao Stone vein, the battle here has become a mess of porridge, and a large number of True Ancestors are fighting here, wanting to snatch the Forbidden Dao Stone.

For them, taking away a Forbidden Dao Stone is a big profit.

It's a pity that the Forbidden Dao Stone is very difficult to excavate, because the Forbidden Dao Stone veins are very hard, and they are cultivated like a Dao weapon, and it may take a long time for the True Ancestor who is too weak to dig out a Forbidden Dao Stone.

Of course, there are also taboo Dao stones that are relatively easy to mine, but there are too few such taboo Dao stones.

Some True Ancestors successfully excavated a Forbidden Dao Stone, and they were targeted by other True Ancestors, and the battle began.

Soon.

One by one, the true ancestors of the big forces descended here, and they did not fight at the first time, but explored the yield of this forbidden Dao stone vein, which was also the task assigned to them by the above.

Each faction has a relative method of probing production, so one by one it is probing.

After a while, they figured it out.

"Nearly half a million Forbidden Dao Stones!"

Many big forces have been amazed.

This is not a small vein, so many forbidden Dao stones, their value is too great, enough to arouse the greed of the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

If there was one force occupying this forbidden Dao Stone vein, it would be enough for the entire force to develop rapidly.

Moreover, for the True Ancestors, the Forbidden Dao Stone also has an amazing effect, that is, refining the power of the True Ancestor, using the stimulation of the energy of the Forbidden Dao Stone, so that the True Ancestor's power of the True Ancestor can grow rapidly and continue to be refined.

One Forbidden Dao Stone is enough for a True Ancestor to cultivate for a long time, although it is a waste to use Forbidden Dao Stones for True Ancestors, but the opportunity to quickly improve their strength, no True Ancestor will give up.

The output of fifty forbidden Dao stones is already very good, and the news has also spread to the Dao Ancestors behind the major forces, and one by one the Dao Ancestors are beginning to move.

Chaos, in the Temple of the Gods.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also learned the news of the Forbidden Dao Stone, and he was also very eager for it.

The Forbidden Dao Stone is not only the currency of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, the Invincible Dao Ancestor, the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and the Domain Ancestor, but also an important strategic resource, and it is also of great value to a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor like him.

If he had enough forbidden Dao stones, he would be able to quickly raise his cultivation to the extreme of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, omitting the time to accumulate cultivation.

Moreover, the power of his Dao Ancestor is very impure, which is also a common problem of the Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, after all, although the Dao Ancestor method passed down by the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor has been perfected, it is still far inferior to the Divine Heaven Realm.

Even if they are constantly improving, there are still big flaws.

If they had enough forbidden Dao stones, they could continuously refine their Dao Ancestor power, thereby stabilizing their foundation and becoming stronger.

It's just—

"The strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor is too weak, if I forcibly descend to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, I won't be able to exert much strength at all!"

He suddenly thought of his apprentice Ye Tian, but shook his head again.

He didn't have the face to let his apprentice snatch the Forbidden Dao Stone for him, and besides, Ye Tian also needed the Forbidden Dao Stone, why should he give it to him?

"Pass the order, let those snatch the Forbidden Dao Stone at all costs. If anyone presents the Forbidden Dao Stone, we will welcome him out of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, do our best to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Great Dao, and then give him the treasure of the Convergence Dao, and help him become a Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor Decree Dao.

He believed that there were definitely many people in the many True Ancestors of the major True Realms who were greedy, even if countless True Ancestors had fallen, as long as they could take away some Forbidden Dao Stones, they would not lose.

All of a sudden, countless True Ancestors from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm poured into the Forbidden Mountain Range, and their purpose was to Forbidden Dao Stones.

It is conceivable that once there is a battle among so many True Ancestors, the God of War True Kingdom will probably be destroyed in an instant.

Ye Tian also came to the Forbidden Dao Stone at this time, but he didn't make a move, there was no need to make a move at the moment, even if he killed those few True Ancestors who had obtained the Forbidden Dao Stones, at most he would only obtain a few Forbidden Dao Stones, and he would also become one of the targets of other True Ancestors.

Even if his strength is invincible, others dare not attack him, but it is not good to cause others to target him.

So he hid there, silently waiting.

Half an hour passed

Above the forbidden Dao stone vein, a figure walked out of the space, accompanied by the sound of regular chains.

"Get out!"

This cold voice swept through the city, and a gust of wind blew away a True Ancestor.

This shows how powerful and terrifying this man is.

"Dao Ancestor!"

Many True Ancestors were extremely jealous.

Some people also recognized it, this person was a very powerful Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor - Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor!

The Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor came from an eightfold heavenly force, Hurricane Mountain!

Hurricane Mountain's fame is not small, and it is often compared with Black Wind Mountain, but in the eyes of many small forces, Black Wind Mountain is not strong, and Hurricane Mountain is strong.

Of course, this is something that people do not understand, but there is no denying the power of Hurricane Mountain.

The strength of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was enough to exert the strength of the top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it was easy to destroy the True Ancestors, so no one dared to approach it.

Suddenly.

The Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor slammed down with a palm, and the big earthquake cracked, directly bombarding the forbidden Dao stone vein.

Even though the Forbidden Dao Stone Vein was very strong, it was still broken out by the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, and there were at least nearly 10,000 Forbidden Dao Stones on this vein fragment.

I saw that the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor waved his sleeves and performed a Dao technique similar to the Qiankun in his sleeve, wanting to take away this piece of ore vein fragments, as for how to dig the forbidden Dao Stone, he could go back and dig slowly.

However, he wanted to take the fragment of the vein, but someone wouldn't allow it.

Another Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor appeared and struck hard at the vein fragment.

I saw that the fragment of the ore vein collapsed and flew out and flew to Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

This fragment was equivalent to nearly 10,000 forbidden Dao stones, and Ye Tian naturally wouldn't let it go.

Immediately, Ye Tian cast the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, directly enveloping this fragment and absorbing it into his own internal universe.

Now, the universe in Ye Tian's body is already equivalent to the top great universe, which is mainly due to Ouyang Jiu'er giving him the second layer of the world promotion secret technique, Qi Tian secret technique.

The second layer requires Xiao Cheng's forbidden body to be cultivated, and he has just achieved a small success, once the second layer is complete, the inner world is enough to be comparable to the quasi-Dao realm.

It was precisely because the world in the body was much stronger, the effect of the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique was naturally stronger, and the speed of absorbing objects was super fast, so the fragment of the forbidden Dao stone vein was successfully sucked into the body universe in an instant.

This scene happened too quickly, the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor was stunned, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who stopped the Gu Feng Dao Ancestor was also stunned, and even the Dao Ancestors who secretly spied on and did not make a move immediately were dumbfounded.

The target of their vigilance has always been other Dao Ancestors, and they have never cared about the True Ancestors.

Therefore, they did not succeed in reacting, causing this almost 10,000 forbidden Dao stones to fall into Ye Tian's hands.

"Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, hand over the Forbidden Dao Stone, otherwise I will kill you!"

Gu Feng Dao Ancestor threatened.
